The '''Primus Goluud system''' contained the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Primus Goluud/Legends|Primus Goluud]]. There were at least three [[Planet/Legends|planets]] in this system. The [[Star system/Legends|star system]] was destroyed in the [[Battle at Primus Goluud]].

{{System-stub}}
